content: CAN-SPAM vs GDPR pitfalls for SaaS: (1) CAN-SPAM is opt-out (send then let them leave); GDPR is opt-in (must have active consent before marketing email); (2) Classifying promotional content inside transactional emails loses transactional protection — a receipt with a promo banner may trigger marketing rules; (3) GDPR violations: €20M or 4% global turnover; CAN-SPAM: $53K per email; (4) Must keep proof of consent (signed forms, email confirmations) — point-in-time capture; (5) Pre-checked opt-in boxes NOT valid GDPR consent; (6) No physical address in footer = CAN-SPAM violation; (7) Unsubscribe must be honored within 10 business days (CAN-SPAM) / promptly (GDPR); (8) Daily digest is marketing email — requires explicit opt-in consent, not just account creation.
